title: delissea bicolor
intro: Delissea bicolor, also known as the Hawaiian hedyotis or puai, is a flowering plant native to Hawaii. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Delissea bicolor include its potential to lower blood pressure, alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, and even exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of Delissea bicolor often involve infusions and decoctions of the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, and salves for topical application.
